info.name: School Management API
info.description: Postman collection for School Management APIs — Add School and List Schools by proximity.

request.description: Check if the API server is running.
Adds a new school. All fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Demonstrates validation: empty name and out-of-range latitude.

response.name: 400 Bad Request

request.description: Returns all schools sorted by proximity to user's coordinates.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Demonstrates validation error when latitude/longitude are missing.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
